meta.title: PLC Library To Detect Abnormalities
meta.description:
Gloria Cedillo on S4x22's Stage 2: Technical Deep Dives shows how to use PLC functionality to create blocks that form a PLC Detection Library. She stresses many times that we should "use what we have" in the midst of this dense technical talk.

The presentation uses a Rockwell Automation / Allen-Bradley as the example and shows how the PLC library is composed of blocks around:
- Controller Performance
- Operation
- Risk of Misuse/Abuse
- Security Handlers

Finally, it was interesting to see how some of the items in the detection library align with the Top 20 Secure PLC Coding Practices.
